name: Miss American Pie
recipeIngredient: 21 oz Tart Cherry Pie Filling (1/8 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the blueberry pie filling into the baked crust and chill for 20 minutes.
2. Beat the cream cheese, adding the powdered sugar to it, until smooth.
3. Fold in the whipped topping.
4. Spread the cheese mixture on top of the blueberry pie filling.
5. Chill another 20 minutes.
6. Gently spread the cherry pie filling on top of the cheese mixture.
7. Chill at least 4 hours before serving.
Yield: 1 10-inch pie
